reasoning: This submission fails the non-empty/coherent-field requirement because the task, criterion, and plan explicitly say "TEST ONLY" and read as placeholder text rather than a serious attempt. The endpoint is reachable and AI-readable (https://example.com returned 200 with simple HTML), and a baseline artifact is nominally present, but both scaffold and baseline endpoints point to the generic Example Domain rather than a task-specific system artifact. The plan also does not describe a real iterative self-evolving system, only a smoke test, so the submission does not clear the gate.1 floor.

self_check.free_note: Endpoints were reachable and parseable, but the submission text and endpoint choice were plainly placeholder/test artifacts.
